name: holistic cure tinnitus

phase_0.boundary_condition: The closed boundary of total mind-body-spirit integration and auditory silence.

VINIT.justification: The initial void of true silence, replaced by the uninitialized perception of noise before any intervention.

TANCH.justification: The terminal boundary that contains the whole system of complete mind-body wellness and sealed silence.

AFWD.justification: Directed forward transformation toward healing, building new neural pathways, and cognitive ascent.

AREV.justification: Reverse descent transformation into the physical body to unwind muscular tension and access subconscious root causes.

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of multiple holistic modalities such as CBT, sound therapy, acupuncture, and dietary changes.

IMSCRIB.justification: The patient's self-reference and recognition of their own auditory baseline, separating identity from the symptom.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the holistic root cause analysis into two distinct pathways: the Somatic/Physical branch and the Neuro-Cognitive branch.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the physical and psychological findings exactly back into the unified Holistic Root Cause.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state where the brain successfully filters the sound and the limbic system reduces distress.

EVALF.justification: The negative state where the nervous system remains sensitized, flagging the sound as a threat and causing suffering.

ENGAGR.justification: A paradice holding both the physical presence of the ringing and the psychological absence of suffering simultaneously without resolution.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, append-only rewiring of the auditory cortex that establishes habituation and cannot be undone.

phase_3.void_description: Unprocessed Auditory Noise - the raw, unexamined ringing before any holistic intervention, awareness, or coping mechanism exists.
phase_3.true_description: Filtered Silence - the affirmative state where the nervous system successfully habituates, filters the sound, and achieves relief.
phase_3.false_description: Sensitized Alarm - the negative state where the limbic system flags the ringing as a threat, causing distress and hyperarousal.
phase_3.both_description: Habituated Paradox - the paradice state where the physical sound is still present but the psychological distress is absent, held simultaneously.

steps.domain_action: Initialize the uninitialized auditory state of phantom ringing and the void of true silence.
Establish self-recognition of the tinnitus symptom by the patient, separating identity from the noise.
Branch the holistic assessment into the Neuro-Cognitive pathway (T-arm) and the Somatic pathway (F-arm).
(T-arm) Apply forward morphism of cognitive behavioral progression and psychological adaptation.
(T-arm) Affirmatively evaluate cognitive adaptability, stress reduction, and habituation success.
(F-arm) Apply reverse morphism of somatic descent into physical tension, jaw/neck issues, and stress.
(F-arm) Negatively evaluate physical pathology, muscular hyperactivity, and hyperacusis flare.
Reconstitute the Neuro-Cognitive and Somatic evaluations exactly back into the unified Holistic Root Cause.
Compose the sequential integrative therapy protocol based on the synthesized root cause.
Enter the paradice of paradoxical acceptance, holding the physical presence of the ring and the psychological absence of distress simultaneously.
Drive forward neuroplastic adaptation, reinforcing the new filtered auditory pathways.
Permanently fixate the habituated neural pathways in the auditory cortex as an append-only, irreversible record.
Seal the system at the terminal boundary of holistic equilibrium, completing the cure cycle.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Holistic Intake Questionnaire - translates patient symptoms, history, and lifestyle into actionable therapeutic operations.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Autonomic Nervous System - how the brain, ear, and body communicate stress, healing, and habituation signals.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Neuroplastic Pathways - how the brain stores and retrieves the habituated, filtered response to the ringing.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Circadian and Ultradian Rhythms - determines the timing of therapies, rest, sleep, and neural consolidation.
phase_5.alfs_store: Evidence-Based Holistic Protocols - the canonical reference store for tinnitus retraining, somatic therapies, and CBT.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Metabolic and Cognitive Energy - consumed per therapy session and neural rewiring cycle.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Sensitized Hyperarousal - a high-entropy state of limbic alarm, physical tension, and unfiltered noise perception.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Habituated Equilibrium - a low-entropy state of filtered perception, relaxed physiology, and psychological peace.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The metabolic energy consumed by neuroplastic rewiring is exactly balanced by the entropy exported through somatic release and stress dissipation, maintaining homeostatic equilibrium.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → AREV → EVALF → FFUSE → CLINK → ENGAGR → AFWD → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: holistic cure tinnitus
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 7)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑳  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑱 → 𐑾  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [10] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑳 → 𐑭  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑾 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def holistic_cure_tinnitus_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize the uninitialized auditory state of phantom ringing and the void o...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Establish self-recognition of the tinnitus symptom by the patient, separating...)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (Branch the holistic assessment into the Neuro-Cognitive pathway (T-arm) and the Somatic pathway (F-arm).) / FFUSE [7] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow ((T-arm) Apply forward morphism of cognitive behavioral progression and psycho...)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open ((T-arm) Affirmatively evaluate cognitive adaptability, stress reduction, and ...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip ((F-arm) Apply reverse morphism of somatic descent into physical tension, jaw/...)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check ((F-arm) Negatively evaluate physical pathology, muscular hyperactivity, and h...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [7]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [7] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute the Neuro-Cognitive and Somatic evaluations exactly back into the unified Holistic Root Cause.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Compose the sequential integrative therapy protocol based on the synthesized ...)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑱 𐑾)  -- [9] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Enter the paradice of paradoxical acceptance, holding the physical presence o...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑳 𐑭)  -- [10] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Drive forward neuroplastic adaptation, reinforcing the new filtered auditory ...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑾 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanently fixate the habituated neural pathways in the auditory cortex as a...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Seal the system at the terminal boundary of holistic equilibrium, completing ...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def holistic_cure_tinnitus_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (holistic_cure_tinnitus_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def holistic_cure_tinnitus_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (holistic_cure_tinnitus_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem holistic_cure_tinnitus_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
